scripts.seed:all:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development node seeds/createAdmin.js && node seeds/createVendedor.js && node seeds/createCliente.js && node seeds/createProductsAndCategories.js && node seeds/createTestOrders.js
scripts.seed:all:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production node seeds/createAdmin.js && node seeds/createVendedor.js && node seeds/createCliente.js && node seeds/createProductsAndCategories.js && node seeds/createTestOrders.js
scripts.prisma:push:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx prisma db push
scripts.prisma:push:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx prisma db push
